metadata.title: Joy to the World
metadata.subtitle: Isaac Watts (1719) — Antioch tune by Lowell Mason
metadata.composer: Lowell Mason (1792–1872), tune "Antioch" arranged from Handel's Messiah
metadata.x_pd_basis: Watts (d. 1748) and Mason (d. 1872) are PD by > 150 years
metadata.x_translator: N/A (English original) — paired with たみみなよろこべ (Japanese, 1922) and もろびとこぞりて (Japanese, 1923 sung to the same tune)
